zh.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh.Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Lacy於1170年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親John de Lacy27歲，母親Alice of Essex34歲。她於1190年之前與Sir Peter de Brus I在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1222年2月12日之後在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh-hans.Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Lacy于1170年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲John de Lacy27岁，母亲Alice of Essex34岁。她于1190年之前与Sir Peter de Brus I在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1222年2月12日之后在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Lacy was born in 1170, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Lacy, was 27 and her mother, Alice of Essex, was 34. She married Sir Peter de Brus I before 1190, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 12 February 1222, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Lacy est née en 1170, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Lacy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice of Essex, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Peter de Brus I avant 1190, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 12 février 1222, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Lacy 1170 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Lacy 27 und ihre Mutter Alice of Essex 34. Sie hat vor 1190 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England Sir Peter de Brus I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 12. Februar 1222 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Lacy è nata il nel 1170 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Lacy, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Alice of Essex, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Peter de Brus I prima del 1190, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 12 febbraio 1222, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Lacyが1170年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Lacyは27歳，母Alice of Essexは34歳であった。1190年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでSir Peter de Brus Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1222年2月12日以後にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Lacy(이)가 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Lacy(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice of Essex(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1190년 이전 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Sir Peter de Brus I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 2월 12일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Lacy nasceu em 1170, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Lacy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice of Essex, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Peter de Brus I antes 1190, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 12 de fevereiro de 1222, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Lacy родилась в 1170 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Lacy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice of Essex, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter de Brus I перед 1190 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 12 февраль 1222 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Lacy nació en 1170, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Lacy, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice of Essex, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir Peter de Brus I antes de 1190, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 12 de febrero de 1222, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
